name: Limitada Neat
description: A neat serve of BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum in an old fashioned glass, served without garnish. BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum is the ultimate expression of luxury, reserved for moments that call for something dignified and best shared.
recipe_steps: Use an old fashioned glass, un-chilled.
Pour BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum into the glass.

BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum is the ultimate expression of luxury, reserved for moments that call for something dignified and best shared. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Limitada rum recipe steps Use an old fashioned glass, un-chilled. Pour BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada rum into the glass. Serve, no garnish. Sip and savour.
